problem id: ea67a727
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00100011 -> 01010111
  10001111 -> 11111110
  00000100 -> 01111110
  10010000 -> 11011011
  10100111 -> 11110110
  01100100 -> 01100111
  11101001 -> 10100111
  01011011 -> 01001001
  11010101 -> 00101011

query: 01110110
predicted answer: 10100011
